changelog:
QuickView pre-release v6.24.0.0

- Replaced WIC TIFF decoding with a custom mini-TIFF parser. In practical tests, the decoding time for a 12.8MP TIFF has improved significantly from 1.9s to 360ms. Note: To keep the application size small, no third-party TIFF decoding libraries were used. The custom decoder might not cover all edge cases, so if you encounter any display anomalies, please report a bug.

- Added drag-to-resize functionality for the filmstrip.

- Fixed an issue where the OSD (On-Screen Display) transparency was incorrect


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/justnullname/QuickView/compare/v6.22.3...v6.24.0.0
